title: Health Indicator Display
description: Shows a live health bar under every player's name using easy scoreboard visuals. Works in survival, creative, and multiplayer. Lightweight and fully automatic.
body:
❤️ Health Indicator Datapack
This datapack adds a clean and dynamic health bar under player names, just like popular Minecraft servers. As players take damage or heal, the heart count updates instantly — no lag, no mods, no plugins.

Perfect for PvP, SMP worlds, minigames, or simply tracking player health in survival.

⭐ Features

✔ Display health under player name
✔ Real-time updates (0-lag tick function)
✔ Works in multiplayer + singleplayer
✔ Shows exact heart amount
✔ Compatible with armor, potions & effects
✔ No setup — works automatically
✔ Supports Minecraft 1.21+


🎯 Perfect For

SMP servers

PvP arenas

Minigames

Hardcore worlds

Friendly survival with friends

📦 Installation

Download the .zip

Move it to world/datapacks/

Run /reload

Done — hearts will appear instantly under names.
